# PERF-222 positive: generic function instantiation in loop
lang: go
file: PERF-222-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Item struct {
	Value int
}

func processItem[T any](v T) int {
	return 1
}

func Render(items []Item) int {
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		total += processItem[Item](item)
	}
	return total
}
